resources.string: I have read and understood the information above

This app is intended for family use and emergency situations.

When features are enabled, the app may:
• Share the phone's location via SMS
• Send battery level alerts
• Play a loud emergency alarm when needed
• Send messages when safe zones are entered or exited

IMPORTANT:
• All features must be enabled manually
• Only approved numbers can receive information
• No information is sent to servers or cloud services
• All data stays local on the device or is sent via SMS

ETHICS & CONSENT:
• This app is not intended for covert surveillance
• The phone's user should be aware of what is shared
• Features can be turned off at any time
• The app can always be uninstalled

By continuing you confirm that:
• You understand what the app does
• You consent to the use of these features
• You have the right to enable these features on this device
Enable features below. Changes require device lock.
Reply with location when a whitelisted number sends \"POS\".
⚠ Commands must arrive as regular SMS. If the sender uses RCS/chat messages, ask them to disable chat features in their messaging app.
Send SMS to whitelisted numbers when battery level drops below a threshold.
Play loud sound + vibration even in silent mode when a whitelisted number sends \"PANIC\".
Send SMS to whitelisted numbers when entering/leaving selected zones.
Send a command as regular SMS to a trusted contact (bypasses RCS).
Zones that trigger SMS alerts when the device enters or exits. Requires the geofence feature to be enabled.
Tap the map to select a location
Only these contacts can send commands or receive alerts. Use the checkboxes to control what each contact is allowed to do.
